title: AI Assistant
delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this bot? This action cannot be undone.
force_delete_confirm_message: This bot has {{count}} running task(s). Deleting this bot may affect these tasks.
force_delete_warning: Warning: Force deleting may cause running tasks to fail or become orphaned.
group_required_message: You must select a target group before creating a bot in group mode

form.name: Name
form.import_mcp_desc: Please paste standardized MCP configuration JSON. The system will automatically add type: "sse" if missing or convert transport field to type field.
form.quick_templates: Use Preset Templates for Quick Configuration
form.template_hint: Click template button to autofill configuration, then modify the API Key
form.please_update_api_key: Please update the API Key to your actual key

errors.required: Please fill in all required fields
errors.agent_config_json: Model configuration must be valid JSON
errors.mcp_config_json: MCP configuration must be valid JSON
errors.dify_required_fields: Dify API Key and Base URL are required

form.protocol_hint: Select the protocol type for the model: OpenAI or Claude (Anthropic)
form.dify_api_key_hint: Enter your Dify application API key. Each Dify application has its own API key.
form.dify_api_key_required: Please enter Dify API Key and Base URL first
form.dify_base_url_hint: Dify API base URL. Use https://api.dify.ai for Dify Cloud, or your self-hosted URL.
form.dify_mode_description: Dify bot delegates execution to external Dify API service. Enter your Dify application API key to get started.
form.dify_parameters_hint: Configure the input parameters for this application. These values will be used when executing tasks.
form.dify_no_parameters: No parameters configured for this application.
